options.name: -ReferenceSwitcher
options.description:
If this is specified, only PackageReferences with matching ProjectReference will be updated.
-color -noColor
By default redirected console output (VS Console Window) does not use colors,
because ANSI sequences are not supported but System Console Windows does.
With -color -noColor you can force a mode.
-help -?                   Shows this help

options.name: -Major
options.description: update up to the highest major (default)

options.name: -Minor
options.description: update up to the highest minor (major remains the same)

options.name: -Patch
options.description: update up to the highest patch (major/minor remains the same)

options.name: -PreRelease
options.description:
allow pre releases
-ro -readonly              does not make any changes

options.name: -unicode
options.description:
use Unicode ending
-color -noColor            turns colorization on/off (default: auto)
<file(s)>                  path(s) to sln/proj file(s)
